message:
chore: beads sync, ubsignore updates, perf data refresh

- .beads/issues.jsonl: Updated issue tracker with session progress
- .ubsignore: Extended ignore patterns for UBS scanning
- perf.data: Refreshed perf profiling data (reduced from 2.3MB to 171KB
  after removing stale profiles)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
